rationale: Luo and Kumar (2013) is discussed multiple times in the citing paper's literature review and is explicitly summarized in Table 1 as a central prior B2B dynamic-marketing study. The citing paper uses it to define a specific limitation (focus on social/RM contacts and relationship-state migration) and to motivate its own modeling and construct choices. This is more than background listing because it directly shapes the paper's claimed contribution and conceptual setup, even without reusing the same HMM specification.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Luo and Kumar (2013) as a key predecessor and then narrows and improves that line by separating economic vs relational communication content and modeling continuous latent stock/perceived-importance dynamics rather than relying on a single social-contact relationship-state framing.
